prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-EMSPOCKETKNIFE-ORG-HPNR Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Wartech Existing Title: Wartech Folding Pocket Knife with Serrated Tanto Blade EMS Emblem Handle Description: Be ready for everyday tasks and emergency situations with the Wartech PWT229 Folding Pocket Knife. Built with a durable 3CR13 stainless steel tanto blade, this knife provides reliable cutting performance with a combination straight and serrated edge for versatility.

The aluminum handle features a bold EMS emblem and offers a comfortable, secure grip. The knife opens smoothly using a manual thumb-open design, giving you controlled, dependable blade deployment.

For added utility and preparedness, the knife includes a cord cutter, glass breaker, and a sturdy belt clip for convenient carry. With its rugged build and practical safety tools, this is a dependable option for outdoor use, work environments, or emergency response needs. Search Terms: tanto folding knife; EMS pocket knife; thumb open blade; serrated utility knife; aluminum handle knife; emergency rescue tool; glass breaker knife; cord cutter tool; EDC folding knife; stainless steel tanto blade; work knife; outdoor gear Features: - DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL BLADE - Features a strong serrated tanto blade ideal for cutting, slicing, and utility tasks. - MANUAL OPEN OPERATION - Designed for smooth, controlled blade opening using the built-in thumb stud. - ALUMINUM HANDLE WITH EMS EMBLEM - Lightweight, colorful handle provides a secure grip with an eye-catching EMS-themed design. - BUILT-IN SAFETY TOOLS - Includes an integrated cord cutter and glass breaker for emergency situations. - CONVENIENT TO CARRY - Equipped with a sturdy belt clip for easy access during work, travel, or outdoor activities. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
